extension.summary: Backfill missing age ratings in your Kodi library
extension.description: Automatically fills missing age certifications for movies and TV shows using TMDB, OMDB, and country-specific rating agencies. Supports 9 European and US rating systems. Runs in the background and checks periodically for items without certifications.
extension.news: v0.3.0 (2026-06-04) - Initial release - Automatically fills missing age certifications for movies and TV shows - 9 country presets: NL, BE, DE, AT, GB, US, FR, DK, SE - Searches TMDB, OMDB, and national rating authority websites (FSK, BBFC, Medieraadet, Kijkwijzer) - Converts between rating systems using conservative rounding - Runs in the background with configurable scan intervals
